title: DecisionRequest
description: A normalized authorization request submitted to the policy engine. Protocol-specific fields must not appear here; adapters are responsible for normalization before this structure is constructed.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this request. UUID v4 recommended. Used to correlate the request with its DecisionResponse and AuditEvent. Must be non-empty.

subject_id.description: Stable identifier of the requesting subject. For human subjects: JWT sub claim (UUID). For device subjects: device certificate CN or device identifier. Must be non-empty.

subject_roles.description: Normalized role names held by the subject at request time. Items must be non-empty. Duplicates are not permitted — the Python model normalizes roles to a sorted, deduplicated set on construction.

subject_attrs.description: Additional subject attributes for ABAC policy conditions. All keys and values are strings.

resource_id.description: Normalized resource identifier in the format '{type}:{qualifier[:{subqualifier}...]}'. Examples: 'hvac:zone-a', 'sensor:co2:lobby', 'device:chiller-1'. Null when the request is not resource-specific.

action.description: Action name in the format '{verb}:{domain}[:{object}]' with at least two colon-separated segments. Examples: 'write:hvac:setpoint', 'read:audit:log', 'subscribe:telemetry'. Must be non-empty.

context.description: Key/value context for policy conditions. Examples: site, maintenance_window, operational_mode. All values are strings.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the request was constructed. Must include timezone offset (e.g. '2026-05-22T14:30:00Z' or '2026-05-22T14:30:00+00:00'). Timezone-naive timestamps are rejected by the Python model.
